penalties.fact: During post-Qualifying Technical Inspection, GTD PRO Car #1 was found to have camber in excess of the permitted limit as defined by MMTB_IWSC_2026_02
penalties.decision: Lap Times are invalidated, Car is moved to the back of the Category

penalties.fact: During post-Qualifying Technical Inspection, GTP Car #31 was found to have friction area of the rear skid block beyond the permitted tolerance per LMDh TR Appendices Appendix C Art. 3.5.9
penalties.decision: Lap times are invalidated, Car is moved to the back of the Class.
